mapper.select: SELECT place_id FROM place WHERE place_id = TO_NUMBER(#{apiContentId}) AND ROWNUM = 1
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_PLACE.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO place ( place_id, partner_id, place_name, category, address, latitude, longitude, phone_number, description, image_url, createdtime ) VALUES ( #{placeId}, 0, #{placeName}, #{category}, #{address}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{phoneNumber}, #{description}, #{imageUrl}, SYSDATE )

INSERT INTO place ( place_id, partner_id, place_name, category, address, latitude, longitude, phone_number, description, image_url, createdtime ) VALUES ( #{placeId}, 0, #{placeName}, #{category}, #{address}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{phoneNumber}, #{description}, #{imageUrl}, SYSDATE )
MERGE INTO accommodation a USING DUAL ON (a.place_id = #{placeId}) WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (place_id, checkintime, checkouttime) VALUES (#{placeId}, #{checkintime}, #{checkouttime})
mapper.select:
SELECT place_id AS placeId, place_name AS placeName, address AS address, latitude AS latitude, longitude AS longitude, category AS category, image_url AS imageUrl, phone_number AS phoneNumber, description AS description FROM place WHERE ( UPPER(place_name) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(address) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' )
AND UPPER(category) = UPPER(#{category})
ORDER BY CASE WHEN image_url IS NOT NULL AND image_url != '' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, place_name FETCH FIRST 50 ROWS ONLY

SELECT place_id AS placeId, place_name AS placeName, address AS address, latitude AS latitude, longitude AS longitude, category AS category, image_url AS imageUrl, phone_number AS phoneNumber, description AS description FROM place WHERE description IS NULL AND place_id > 100000 AND category NOT IN ('STAY', 'FESTIVAL', '15', '32') ORDER BY place_id DESC FETCH FIRST 10000 ROWS ONLY
SELECT place_id FROM place WHERE image_url IS NULL AND place_id > 100000 AND category NOT IN ('ACCOMMODATION') FETCH FIRST 500 ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO likes (like_id, member_id, target_id, target_type, created_at) VALUES (SEQ_LIKES_ID.NEXTVAL, #{memberId}, #{placeId}, 'PLACE', SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT p.view_count AS "viewCount", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM likes l WHERE l.target_id = p.place_id AND l.target_type = 'PLACE') AS "likeCount" FROM place p WHERE p.place_id = #{placeId}
SELECT p.place_id FROM place p LEFT JOIN restaurant r ON p.place_id = r.place_id WHERE p.category = 'RESTAURANT' AND r.place_id IS NULL FETCH FIRST 1000 ROWS ONLY
mapper.update: MERGE INTO restaurant r USING DUAL ON (r.place_id = #{placeId}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET opentimefood = #{openTime}, restdatefood = #{restDate}, parkingfood = #{parking}, infocenterfood = #{infoCenter}, reservationfood = #{reservation} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (place_id, opentimefood, restdatefood, parkingfood, infocenterfood, reservationfood) VALUES (#{placeId}, #{openTime}, #{restDate}, #{parking}, #{infoCenter}, #{reservation})

MERGE INTO restaurant_facility f USING DUAL ON (f.place_id = #{placeId}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET chkcreditcardfood = #{chkCreditCard}, kidsfacility = #{kidsFacility}, packing = #{packing} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (facility_id, place_id, chkcreditcardfood, kidsfacility, packing) VALUES (SEQ_FACILITY_ID.NEXTVAL, #{placeId}, #{chkCreditCard}, #{kidsFacility}, #{packing})

MERGE INTO MENU m USING DUAL ON (m.place_id = #{placeId}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET firstmenu = #{firstMenu}, treatmenu = #{treatMenu}, smallimageurl = #{smallImageUrl} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (menu_id, place_id, firstmenu, treatmenu, smallimageurl) VALUES (SEQ_MENU_ID.NEXTVAL, #{placeId}, #{firstMenu}, #{treatMenu}, #{smallImageUrl})
mapper.select: SELECT r.opentimefood AS "opentimefood", r.restdatefood AS "restdatefood", r.parkingfood AS "parkingfood", f.chkcreditcardfood AS "chkcreditcardfood", f.kidsfacility AS "kidsfacility", f.packing AS "packing", m.firstmenu AS "firstmenu", m.treatmenu AS "treatmenu" FROM restaurant r LEFT JOIN restaurant_facility f ON r.place_id = f.place_id LEFT JOIN MENU m ON r.place_id = m.place_id WHERE r.place_id = #{placeId}
mapper.update: MERGE INTO place p USING DUAL ON (p.place_id = #{placeId}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET place_name = #{placeName}, address = #{address}, latitude = #{latitude}, longitude = #{longitude}, category = #{category}, image_url = #{imageUrl} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (place_id, place_name, address, latitude, longitude, category, image_url) VALUES (#{placeId}, #{placeName}, #{address}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{category}, #{imageUrl})
